tests.reason: particleField.init() and .draw() now accept THREE.Scene instead of CanvasRenderingContext2D. Canvas 2D draw logic is stubbed out pending future Three.js port. Tests relying on Canvas 2D API calls (fillRect, arc, fillStyle) must be removed or skipped. Tests for init behavior (particle counts, positions, determinism) must pass Scene. Tests for draw-based displacement/motion are skipped since draw is a no-op stub.

waveField.init() and .draw() now accept THREE.Scene instead of CanvasRenderingContext2D. Canvas 2D draw logic is stubbed out. Tests relying on Canvas 2D API calls (lineTo, stroke, beginPath, strokeStyle) must be skipped. Tests for init behavior (wave counts, positions, determinism) must pass Scene.

initScene() now returns { renderer, scene, camera } instead of { canvas, ctx }. attachResizeHandler() now takes (renderer, camera) instead of (canvas, ctx). startLoop() now takes (renderer, scene, camera, deps) instead of (canvas, ctx). Tests rewritten to use Three.js mocks and new API signatures.
